families_executed.description: Strict PIT pick at filing-public bound from filing_index when available; otherwise explicit signal_available_date proxy (labeled).

leakage_audit.rule: Any picked row must have as_of_date <= signal_bound for that spec.

families_executed.description: Production-equivalent PIT pick per row with sector stratum from market_metadata_latest; unknown stratum when sector missing.

leakage_audit.rule: Any picked row must have as_of_date <= signal_bound for that spec.

required_followups: Track scorecard deltas across runs using stable_run_digest.
Narrow claims where proxy_limited_retest_needed; add cohort B only with tight cap.
promotion_gate_phase42.promotion_decision_notes: Phase 42: evidence accumulation + blocker taxonomy + discrimination summary. No auto-promotion.

phase43.rationale: Proxy filing bounds or missing sector rows remain; strengthen rows (backfill) or narrow claims before expecting cleaner discrimination.

phase44.rationale: Bounded backfill or retest changed at least one row-level blocker, scorecard bucket, or gate field. Next: optional second bounded pass, or narrow claims if proxy limits persist.
